dashboard.subtitle: Continue where you left off and improve your English.

landing.title: Speak English Fluently
landing.subtitle: Easily and Fast
landing.desc: Throw away your grammar books! Learn English naturally like native speakers do. The Effortless English system helps you understand native speech instantly and speak automatically.
landing.method_desc: Instead of analyzing grammar, we use Mini-Story listening lessons to train your brain to think in natural English automatically.
landing.deep_listening_desc: Listen to compelling stories rather than boring textbook dialogues. Master real, native English vocabulary intuitively.
landing.listen_answer_desc: Instead of "listen and repeat", our mini-stories train you to think in English by asking simple questions that you answer quickly.
landing.pov_desc: Learn grammar naturally without studying rules. We teach grammar intuitively by telling the same story from different times (past, present, future).
landing.cta_desc: Join thousands of successful English speakers who unlocked their potential with our courses.

about.title: The 7 Rules of TAEnglish
about.desc: Learn how to speak English fluently, confidently, and automatically without thinking about grammar rules.
about.rule1_desc: Never study a single, isolated word. When you find a new word, always write down the phrase it is in. Phrases give you meaning, context, and grammar automatically.
about.rule2_title: Rule 2: Do Not Study Grammar Rules
about.rule2_desc: Put away your grammar books. Grammar teaches you to think about English, but you want to speak automatically. Stop studying grammar to speak faster.
about.rule3_title: Rule 3: Learn with Your Ears, Not Your Eyes
about.rule3_desc: Listening is the absolute key to excellent speaking. You must listen to understandable English. You must listen to English EVERY DAY.
about.rule4_desc: Deep learning is the secret to speaking easily. You must learn English deeply. It's not enough to know a word; you must put it deep into your brain through intense repetition.

metadata.description: Learn English naturally with Tai Anh. The method of deep listening — speaking correctly — thinking in English, without studying grammar rules first.
metadata.og_description: Learn English naturally and practically with Tai Anh. The method of deep listening — speaking correctly — thinking in English.
